heading: Hunting, pursuing, capturing, etc., in sanctuaries in national forests unlawful
label: 694a Hunting, pursuing, capturing, etc., in sanctuaries in national forests unlawful
text: When such fish and game sanctuaries or refuges have been established as provided in , hunting, pursuing, poisoning, angling for, killing, or capturing by trapping, netting, or any other means, or attempting to hunt, pursue, angle for, kill, or capture any wild animals or fish for any purpose whatever upon the lands of the United States within the limits of said fish and game sanctuaries or refuges shall be unlawful except as hereinafter provided.section 694 of this title
notes: Amendments1948—Act , struck out penal provisions. See , Crimes and Criminal Procedure.June 25, 1948section 41 of Title 18
Effective Date of 1948 AmendmentSection 10 of act , provided that the amendment made by that act is effective .June 25, 1948Sept. 1, 1948
